summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DOMMMA V2 new features: Contractor Marketplace (search, profiles, services, bookings), Landlord My Properties (CRUD with forms), Enhanced Browse page with Apply Now + Message buttons, and Dashboard role-based navigation. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested and working.
passed_tests: Backend: API root /api/ returns DOMMMA V2 message
Backend: POST /api/contractors/profile creates contractor profile
Backend: GET /api/contractors/search returns contractors list
Backend: GET /api/contractors/search?specialty=plumbing filters by specialty
Backend: GET /api/contractors/search?q=plumbing query search works
Backend: POST /api/contractors/services creates contractor service
Backend: GET /api/services/search returns services list
Backend: GET /api/services/search?category=plumbing filters by category
Backend: POST /api/bookings creates booking for customer
Backend: POST /api/listings/create creates landlord listing
Backend: GET /api/listings/landlord/{id} returns landlord listings
Backend: POST /api/upload/image uploads image successfully
Backend: GET /api/listings returns public listings
Backend: GET /api/listings with filters works
Frontend: Homepage loads with Hero, Nova Search, Featured Properties, Contractor Services sections
Frontend: Homepage shows 12 property cards in 4-column grid
Frontend: Contractor services section shows 6 categories (Plumbing, Electrical, Painting, Renovation, Landscaping, Cleaning)
Frontend: /contractors page loads with search input and category filters
Frontend: /contractors shows 10 contractor cards from seeded data
Frontend: Contractor detail modal opens with services list and 'Request Booking' button
Frontend: Modal shows 3 'Book Now' buttons for contractor services
Frontend: Landlord login redirects to dashboard with correct sidebar
Frontend: Landlord sidebar shows My Properties, Applications, Find Contractors links
Frontend: /dashboard/my-properties page loads with 'Add Property' button
Frontend: Add Property form modal opens with all fields (title, type, price, address, bedrooms, etc.)
Frontend: Contractor dashboard shows Jobs, Payments, Messages in sidebar
Frontend: Contractor sidebar shows 'My Profile' link
Frontend: Browse page loads with 23 listings and map view
Frontend: Listing modal shows 'Apply Now' and 'Message' buttons
Frontend: Renter dashboard shows all 8 expected sidebar links
seed_data_creation: 7 contractors and 18 services already seeded in DB. 21+ listings available.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V2 features verified and working: 1) Contractor Marketplace with search, filtering, profile detail modals, service listings, and booking flow. 2) Landlord My Properties page with Add Property form modal. 3) Browse page with Apply Now and Message buttons in listing detail modal. 4) Role-based dashboard sidebar navigation (Renter: Browse/Applications/Maintenance, Landlord: My Properties/Applications/Jobs, Contractor: My Profile/Jobs/Payments). Backend APIs all passing: contractor profiles, services, search, bookings, landlord listings, image upload.

Homepage.details: Hero section, Nova AI search bar, Featured Properties (12 cards, 4-column grid), Contractor Services section with 6 categories

Contractor Marketplace (/contractors).details: Search input, category filters (plumbing, electrical, etc.), 10 contractor cards, detail modal with services, booking flow

Landlord My Properties.details: Stats cards, Add Property button, form modal with all fields, image upload area, amenity toggles

Contractor Profile Dashboard.details: Profile/Services/Bookings tabs, business info form, add service modal, booking management

Browse Page.details: 23 listings loaded, map integration, listing detail modal with Apply Now and Message buttons

Role-Based Dashboard Navigation.details: Renter sees: Dashboard, Browse, Applications, Contractors, Payments, Maintenance, Messages, Documents. Landlord sees: My Properties, Applications. Contractor sees: My Profile, Jobs.

API Endpoints.details: Contractor profiles, services, search, bookings, landlord listings, image upload - all 14 tests passed
